introSection: Hundeprutterutchebane (Danish for "Dog Fart") is a steel kiddie roller coaster located at BonBon-Land in Holme-Olstrup, Sjælland, Denmark. Opened in 1993, it was one of the park's first roller coasters. The ride features a giant dog called Henry.
fullText: Hundeprutterutchebane (Danish for "Dog Fart") is a steel kiddie roller coaster located at BonBon-Land in Holme-Olstrup, Sjælland, Denmark. Opened in 1993, it was one of the park's first roller coasters. The ride features a giant dog called Henry.
